name: Medi-Van

districts_or_customers: BCBSND Medicaid Expansion NEMT, Becker County DAC clients, Upper Midwest Medicaid riders (MN/ND border region)

name: Non Ambulatory Trnsprtn Svc

succession_signal: high (founded 1981, long-tenured family leadership at a small nonprofit)

fit_notes: Poor Summit fit: registered 501(c) nonprofit providing Medicaid wheelchair/NEMT service, not a for-profit school-bus contractor. Not acquirable in normal tuck-in framework. Skip.
